what: Toolkit for Human-Readable and Expert Regular Expressions
title: Toolkit for Human-Readable and Expert Regular Expressions
Toolkit for Human-Readable and Expert Regular Expressions
text: folders files often found R package. R Packages (2e): Package structure state

title: Toolkit for Human-Readable and Expert Regular Expressions
text: devtools::document() create documentation exported functions /R folder files. pkgdown::build_site_github_pages() create /docs folder can used Github Github pages website.

title: Build an alphanumeric pattern — xp_build_alnum
text: pattern (Optional) existing pattern pipe. n Exact number characters.

title: Build an alphanumeric pattern — xp_build_alnum
code: xp_build_alnum(n = 5) #> [1] "[[:alnum:]]{5}" xp_literal("#") %>% xp_build_alnum(n = 3) #> Error in xp_literal("#") %>% xp_build_alnum(n = 3): could not find function "%>%"

title: Build a wildcard pattern — xp_build_any
text: pattern (Optional) existing pattern pipe. n Exact number characters.

title: Build a wildcard pattern — xp_build_any
code: xp_literal("A") %>% xp_build_any() %>% xp_literal("C") #> Error in xp_literal("A") %>% xp_build_any() %>% xp_literal("C"): could not find function "%>%" xp_build_any(n = 10) #> [1] ".{10}"

title: Build a digit pattern — xp_build_digits
text: pattern (Optional) existing pattern pipe. n Exact number digits.

title: Build a digit pattern — xp_build_digits
code: xp_build_digits(n = 3) #> [1] "\\d{3}" xp_literal("Area Code: ") %>% xp_build_digits(3) #> Error in xp_literal("Area Code: ") %>% xp_build_digits(3): could not find function "%>%"

title: Build a letter pattern — xp_build_letters
text: pattern (Optional) existing pattern pipe. case "" (default), "lower", "upper". n Exact number repetitions.

title: Build a letter pattern — xp_build_letters
code: xp_build_letters(case = "upper", n = 3) #> [1] "[[:upper:]]{3}" xp_build_digits(1) %>% xp_build_letters(case = "lower", n = 2) #> Error in xp_build_digits(1) %>% xp_build_letters(case = "lower", n = 2): could not find function "%>%"

title: Build a whitespace pattern — xp_build_whitespace
text: pattern (Optional) existing pattern pipe. n Exact number spaces/tabs.

title: Build a whitespace pattern — xp_build_whitespace
code: xp_literal("Word") %>% xp_build_whitespace() %>% xp_literal("Word") #> Error in xp_literal("Word") %>% xp_build_whitespace() %>% xp_literal("Word"): could not find function "%>%" xp_build_whitespace(n = 2) #> [1] "\\s{2}"

title: Find matches in text — xp_find
text: Extracts occurrences pattern text returns character vector.

title: Find matches in text — xp_find
text: text character vector search. pattern regex pattern use. unlist Logical. TRUE (default), returns single vector matches.

title: Find matches in text — xp_find
code: "Order 123 and 456" %>% xp_find(xp_build_digits(3)) #> Error in "Order 123 and 456" %>% xp_find(xp_build_digits(3)): could not find function "%>%"

what: Add literal text to a pattern — xp_literal
title: Add literal text to a pattern — xp_literal
Add literal text to a pattern — xp_literal
Add literal text to a pattern — xp_literal
text: pattern (Optional) existing regex string pipe. literal exact text/symbols want add.

title: Add literal text to a pattern — xp_literal

what: Match one of two patterns — xp_op_either
title: Match one of two patterns — xp_op_either
Match one of two patterns — xp_op_either
Match one of two patterns — xp_op_either
text: pattern_a first pattern. pattern_b second pattern.

title: Match one of two patterns — xp_op_either
Match one of two patterns — xp_op_either
Make a pattern optional — xp_op_optional
text: Tells engine preceding pattern may appear 0 1 times.

title: Make a pattern optional — xp_op_optional
code: xp_build_digits(3) %>% xp_op_optional() #> Error in xp_build_digits(3) %>% xp_op_optional(): could not find function "%>%"

title: Repeat a pattern — xp_op_repeat
text: Specifies many times pattern occur. Can handle exact counts, ranges, unbounded "many" matches.

title: Repeat a pattern — xp_op_repeat
text: pattern character string. n Minimum number repetitions. max Maximum number repetitions. Use Inf "". NULL (default), matches exactly n times.

title: Repeat a pattern — xp_op_repeat
code: # Exactly 3 digits xp_build_digits() %>% xp_op_repeat(3) #> Error in xp_build_digits() %>% xp_op_repeat(3): could not find function "%>%"  # Between 2 and 5 letters xp_build_letters() %>% xp_op_repeat(2, 5) #> Error in xp_build_letters() %>% xp_op_repeat(2, 5): could not find function "%>%"  # 1 or more (The "Plus" logic) xp_build_alnum() %>% xp_op_repeat(1, Inf) #> Error in xp_build_alnum() %>% xp_op_repeat(1, Inf): could not find function "%>%"

title: View regex matches — xp_view
text: text character vector search. pattern regex pattern test.

title: View regex matches — xp_view
code: "The cat in the hat" %>% xp_view(xp_build_letters(case = "lower")) #> Error in "The cat in the hat" %>% xp_view(xp_build_letters(case = "lower")): could not find function "%>%"

what: Wrap pattern in word boundaries — xp_wrap_boundary
title: Wrap pattern in word boundaries — xp_wrap_boundary
text: Ensures pattern matches whole word, preventing matches inside strings (e.g., matching 'cat' 'category').

title: Wrap pattern in word boundaries — xp_wrap_boundary
Wrap pattern in word boundaries — xp_wrap_boundary
Wrap pattern in word boundaries — xp_wrap_boundary
Wrap pattern in word boundaries — xp_wrap_boundary
code: # Matches '123' but not '01234' xp_build_digits(3) %>% xp_wrap_boundary() #> Error in xp_build_digits(3) %>% xp_wrap_boundary(): could not find function "%>%"

what: Anchor pattern to the end — xp_wrap_end
title: Anchor pattern to the end — xp_wrap_end
text: Forces pattern match appears end string.

title: Anchor pattern to the end — xp_wrap_end
Anchor pattern to the end — xp_wrap_end
Anchor pattern to the end — xp_wrap_end
Anchor pattern to the end — xp_wrap_end
code: xp_build_letters() %>% xp_wrap_end() #> Error in xp_build_letters() %>% xp_wrap_end(): could not find function "%>%"

what: Anchor pattern to the start — xp_wrap_start
title: Anchor pattern to the start — xp_wrap_start
text: Forces pattern match appears beginning string.

title: Anchor pattern to the start — xp_wrap_start
Anchor pattern to the start — xp_wrap_start
Anchor pattern to the start — xp_wrap_start
Anchor pattern to the start — xp_wrap_start
code: xp_build_digits(3) %>% xp_wrap_start() #> Error in xp_build_digits(3) %>% xp_wrap_start(): could not find function "%>%"
